ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "superclass" TEXT /* Superclass classification of the compound */,
  "dice" REAL /* Dice coefficient for the compound */,
  "dot_product" REAL /* Dot product for the compound */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric for classification */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric for classification */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences or samples */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "chemical_structure" TEXT /* Chemical structure of the compound in a standardized format (e.g., SMILES) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the compound data (e.g., experimental, database, literature) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compound record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compound record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_superclass FOREIGN KEY ("superclass") REFERENCES superclasses ("superclass_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "superclasses" (
  "superclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each superclass */,
  "superclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the superclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the superclass */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the superclass record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the superclass record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("superclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compound being assessed */,
  "dice" REAL /* Dice coefficient calculated for the compound */,
  "dot_product" REAL /* Dot product calculated for the compound */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall calculated for the classification */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision calculated for the classification */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score, which is the harmonic mean of precision and recall */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, technician) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
